privileged_info_summary: The task configures a provider schedule in LibreHealth EHR for a synthetically created provider named Dr. Stephen Strange (username: dr_strange). The calendar event requires setting the time from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM (13:00 to 17:00 in 24-hour format) with the 'In Office' category, recurring weekly on Tuesday and Thursday. The system uses LibreHealth EHR, a real open-source electronic health records system, with real NHANES patient data as background data (9,375 patients from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey), though the specific provider and calendar event are synthetically created for task execution.
